subject: 12hrs left (or less)
body:
12 hours left before 90 days free of Skool drops back to 14 days free.

Get it Here + Money Models Training

Here's the email from yesterday so you don't miss it.

**12 HOURS LEFT**

Heads up - the offer I gave everyone for free at my launch expires in 12hrs.

10x the value. 10x cheaper than list price (only $9/mo after 90 days for as long as you subscribe to Skool). 7x the free time to get going.

The Money Models Training + Skool specific training.

All free. Start here free: skool.com/hormozi
